Off Calendar Jun-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Melissa Land's Motion to Mediate Case in Lieu of Non-Binding Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case removed from Judicial Arbitration. Order signed. Case is scheduled for Jury Trial on 12/29/2011 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give Notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Court Ordered a Mediation Enforcement Order to Show Cause on 9/28/2011 at 10:00 AM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
